title: Shettihalli Rosary Church
tagline: Shettihalli Rosary Church — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Shettihalli Church (referred to as Sathalli in colonial documents) is located 2km from Shettihalli, Hassan district in Karnataka.
overview.description: Shettihalli Church (referred to as Sathalli in colonial documents) is located 2km from Shettihalli, Hassan district in Karnataka. Built in the 1860s by the French missionaries in India, the church is a magnificent structure of Gothic Architecture. After the construction of the Hemavati Dam and Reservoir in 1960 the church was Submerged under water due to the dam. It has since then become a famous tourist spot where people flock to see the half submerged church during monsoon.

topPlaces.name: Yagachi River
topPlaces.description: The Yagachi is a river in Karnataka, India. It is a major tributary of Hemavati river.

topPlaces.name: Gorur dam
topPlaces.description: The Gorur Dam is constructed across the Hemavati river in 1979. The dam is located in Gorur village of Hassan district, Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Hulkund
topPlaces.description: Hulkund is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It has Ramlingeswar Temple.

topPlaces.name: Gorur, Hassan
topPlaces.description: Gorur is a village in Hassan district of Karnataka state in India, it is located near Arkalgud taluk.

topPlaces.name: Adibylu
topPlaces.description: Adibylu is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Alur taluk of Hassan district, in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Nanjapur
topPlaces.description: Nanjapur is a village in Ranga Reddy district in Andhra Pradesh, India. It falls under Shamshabad mandal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shettihalli Rosary Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shettihalli Rosary Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shettihalli Rosary Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (92 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shettihalli Rosary Church?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shettihalli Rosary Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shettihalli Rosary Church?
faq.a: Stays in Shettihalli Rosary Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shettihalli Rosary Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yagachi River, Gorur dam, Hulkund, Gorur, Hassan, Adibylu.
